description_long: This is a tall, freestanding shelving unit made primarily of light-colored wood, featuring three open shelves above a blocky base with three horizontal drawers. The shelves are supported by slender vertical side panels, giving the structure an open and airy appearance. The drawers are flush with the front, lacking visible handles, and provide enclosed storage space beneath the open shelving. The wood grain is visible throughout, suggesting a natural or lightly finished surface. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public waiting areas. The back and sides are solid, while the front is open for easy access to both shelves and drawers.
description: A tall, light-wood shelving unit with three open shelves above three flush drawers, featuring a minimalist and functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves above three flush drawers, all accessible from this side.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the depth of the shelves and drawers, as well as the open structure between the vertical supports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid wood back panel covering the entire height of the unit.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the shelves and drawers.
